channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: The Uplift: Celebrating the American Dream
item.description: Ahead of the nation's 250th anniversary, we highlight stories of American heroes and traditions. The founder of e.l.f. Cosmetics shares his journey.

item.title: Trump's DNI nominee Jay Clayton to testify at Senate confirmation hearing
item.description: Clayton, the U.S. attorney for the Southern District of New York, is expected to replace Bill Pulte as director of national intelligence.

item.title: WATCH: High-energy workout Tae Bo makes a comeback
item.description: Hanna Battah speaks with Billy Blanks, who is reintroducing the popular workout to a new generation.

item.title: 26 Meta workers sue over alleged AI-aided layoffs of employees on leave
item.description: A group of 26 Meta employees has filed a lawsuit, claiming the company used AI to select workers for layoffs, unfairly targeting those on medical or parental leave.
